meta.title: The Bacterial Flora of Distilled and Stored Water. III. new species of the genera Corynebacterium, Flavobacterium, Spirillum and Pseudomonas
meta.journalTitle: International Bulletin of Bacteriological Nomenclature and Taxonomy

abstractHtml: Names are proposed and descriptions given for five new species of bacteria isolated from stored distilled water from various laboratories. Corynebacterium aquaticum n. sp. has many of the characteristics of the motile plant pathogenic bacteria that have been placed in genus Corynebacterium. Other species named are Flavobacterium capsulatumn. n. sp., Spirillum delicatum n. s p., Pseudomonas Ianceolata n. sp., and Pseudomonas huttiensis n. sp. Cultures of the type strain of each new species have been deposited in the American Type Culture Collection.
